talent_profiles_json.status: CANONICAL — exists on disk, actively generated and consumed
talent_profiles_json.generated_by: scripts/fetch-approved-talent.js — merges approved profiles from GAS backend, writes via writeJsonIfChanged()
consumed_by: index.html:2467 — fetch('./talent-profiles.json?ts=...') for public talent archive display
admin-review.html:682 — LOCAL_TALENT_URL = './talent-profiles.json', loaded as activeTalentProfiles for 'Active Talent' tab
validate-public-data.js:351 — readJson(TALENT_PROFILES_FILE, []) for talent contact/icon validation
apply-admin-actions.js:1568 — readJson(TALENT_PROFILES_FILE, []) for admin update/archive/unpublish/feature operations
apply-admin-actions.js:2349 — writeJson(TALENT_PROFILES_FILE, nextTalentProfiles) after admin actions

pending_talent_json.status: STALE REFERENCE — does not exist on disk, no script ever generates it
pending_talent_json.what_fetch_approved_talent_does: fetch-approved-talent.js:126 calls getPendingTalent from GAS but ONLY for audit/logging (lines 135, 138, 141, 203). It NEVER writes pending-talent.json.
pending_talent_json.remediation: Remove all 3 CI references (lines 95, 131, 158) from jobs-sync.yml. The pending queue is served in real-time from GAS backend by admin-review.html.

pending_talent_profiles_json.status: STALE REFERENCE — does not exist on disk, no script ever generates it
pending_talent_profiles_json.remediation: Remove all 3 CI references (lines 96, 132, 159) from jobs-sync.yml.

public_talent_js.status: DOES NOT EXIST — no such script. No npm script, no require(), no import references it.
public_talent_js.note: No public-talent pipeline exists. Talent profiles are consumed directly from talent-profiles.json, unlike jobs which have public-jobs.js build step.
public_talent_js.remediation: None needed. Talent does not need a separate public build step.

fetch_approved_talent_js.role: FETCHES approved talent from GAS backend (getApprovedTalent), MERGES into talent-profiles.json
inputs: talent-profiles.json — reads existing profiles for merge

talent_validations: talentContactProtectionViolations — checks Cassandre's contact fields (email, portfolio, linkedin, public_contact)
talentIconRenderViolations — checks icon rendering in page templates (briefcase, linkedin, email)
talent_local_edit_blank_detected — checks for structured local edit blanks

talent_actions.flow: Public form → GAS → Pending Talent sheet

talent_actions.handler: approveRecord_(...) moves row from Pending → Approved (line 166)

talent_apply_html.submission: submitTalentToBackend() → POST to GAS with action='submitTalent'

data_flow_summary.admin_display_active: admin-review.html → fetch(talent-profiles.json) → show active profiles with edit controls
